semantics.evaluation: first-match-wins over `rules`, then `default`. '*' matches any value.

verdicts.allow+log: permitted; the executing tool MUST append a ledger line (JSONL: ts, corpus, provider, purpose, path, tool)
verdicts.conditional: permitted ONLY when the rule's `condition` holds; otherwise treat as deny
verdicts.pending-operator: evaluates as DENY. A named operator decision is required to flip this cell; flipping it is a one-line PR on this file

semantics.note: embedding, rerank, and vision-embedding send FULL content (text or images) to the provider — they are content egress, not metadata egress.

corpora.salus: any path under a `.salus`-marked root, or under a root listed in ~/.config/claude-glm/phi-roots or ~/.config/claude-glm/egress-denylist (the shared glm-guard.ts / parity_guard.py primitives)
corpora.luna-personal: the luna vault root EXCLUDING Clippings/ (journals, maps, sessions, notes)
corpora.handover-state: the handover state repo root (HANDOVER_DIR; work artifacts, specs, session notes). Kept for Mode-B EXTERNAL state repos after the HIMMEL-343 fold: a HANDOVER_DIR nested INSIDE a vault classifies as that vault's corpus instead (fence precedence checks vault roots first — more restrictive; pinned by test, HIMMEL-817)
corpora.himmel-code: himmel checkout(s), worktrees, and the public mirror (code + docs; public-propagated)

local-ollama.note: zero egress; includes qmd local GGUF embeddings

anthropic.note: the operating harness itself (Claude sessions natively read the vaults); recording status quo, not a widening

openai-codex.note: codex via hermes, paid usage bank

alibaba.note: qwen text lanes + free-quota modality bank (HIMMEL-729/765)

rules.condition: per-run explicit opt-in flag (621/622 spec §4.1: even local salus extraction needs a per-run opt-in)
rules.why: PHI stays on-machine; opt-in prevents accidental bulk runs
PHI never leaves the machine. No override exists; no operator decision can be recorded here that flips this row
gemini de-listed; GEMINI/GOOGLE keys stay unset (621/622 P.7)

public-propagated code/docs; impl lanes (codex/GLM/alibaba) are ratified consumers. Caveat rides the lane guards: debrand content-not-name; secrets are excluded by block-read-secrets, not by this matrix
zero egress
operating substrate (sessions read/write handovers natively)

operator ratification 2026-07-09 (jarvis s19→s20 handover authorization: graphify the handover state repo + luna as ONE vault; extends the 2026-07-05 DeepSeek luna override to the handover-state slice, HIMMEL-343), ledgered per run

rules.condition: brief-scoped: task briefs/excerpts through the guarded dispatch chokepoints only — never bulk corpus runs
rules.why: worker briefs necessarily carry handover-derived context; the chokepoint audit is the ledger

rules.condition: brief-scoped: task briefs/excerpts through the guarded dispatch chokepoints only — never bulk corpus runs
rules.why: same as openai-codex row

rules.condition: brief-scoped: task briefs/excerpts through the guarded dispatch chokepoints only — never bulk corpus runs
rules.why: same as openai-codex row
zero egress
operating substrate
subsumed by the operator DeepSeek override (2026-07-05) which covers the more-sensitive luna-personal corpus

rules.condition: only if the 621/622 G2.3 local-quality ladder forces it AND the operator provisions ZAI_API_KEY for it (spec §4.2 exception; never mid-run)
rules.why: pre-existing narrow exception for clipped public content

rules.decision_needed: HIMMEL-765 pilot: ratify Alibaba embedding egress for Clippings (recommended FIRST pilot corpus — clipped public web content, lowest sensitivity)
rules.why: filed as valuable (765) but the egress widening was never explicitly ratified; default deny until flipped

rules.decision_needed: same HIMMEL-765 decision as the embedding cell
rules.why: rerank sends query + candidate documents — same content egress class

rules.decision_needed: same HIMMEL-765 decision (tongyi-embedding-vision; vault image search)
rules.why: images from clips are content egress too
zero egress; the salus-grade fallback backend
operating substrate (Claude sessions read the vault natively every day)
operator override 2026-07-05 (speed): luna non-Clippings graphify extraction on DeepSeek, single model, ledgered per run

operator ratification 2026-07-10 (HIMMEL-833): chat-note enrichment — full note bodies of luna/chats/* to DeepSeek, plus the vault-wide top-200 tag vocabulary (tag names only) sent with each request as the allowed-tags list; exposure-identical in kind to the 2026-07-05 extraction override; ledgered per run incl. vocab_tags (log obligation survives ratification, never plain allow)

rules.decision_needed: HIMMEL-765: ratify Alibaba embedding egress for PERSONAL luna content (journals/notes/sessions). This is THE contradiction cell from the Fable 2026-07-08 review — the 621/622 fence as specced denies it; 765 as filed needs it
rules.why: personal-content egress to a new provider is an operator call, not an agent default; deny until ratified

rules.decision_needed: same HIMMEL-765 decision as the embedding cell
rules.why: same content egress class
